name: Hiring Pipeline
description: Track open requisitions as Epics with each candidate as a linked child issue moving through sourcing, screening, interviewing, and offer — one board per role, one view for the whole hiring plan.

teams.name: People & Recruiting
teams.description: Owns open requisitions and the candidate pipeline.

workflowStates.name: Sourced
workflowStates.description: Identified, not yet contacted or applied.

workflowStates.name: Rejected
workflowStates.description: Not moving forward, at any stage.

labels.name: urgent-req
labels.description: Backfill or blocking hire — prioritize scheduling.

labels.name: referral
labels.description: Came in through an employee referral.

issueTemplates.title: Req: Senior Backend Engineer
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Team:** Platform · **Level:** Senior · **Location:** Remote (US/EU)

### Must-haves
- 5+ years backend, Postgres, distributed systems

### Nice-to-haves
- Experience with realtime systems (WebSockets, pub/sub)

issueTemplates.title: Candidate: J. Alvarez — Senior Backend Engineer
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** Referral (from Priya, Eng)

**Stage notes:** Strong system-design round. Onsite loop scheduled.

issueTemplates.title: Candidate: R. Kim — Senior Backend Engineer
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** LinkedIn outbound

**Stage notes:** Phone screen passed, technical screen scheduled Thursday.

issueTemplates.title: Req: Product Designer
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Team:** Product · **Level:** Mid-Senior · **Location:** Remote

### Must-haves
- Portfolio showing 0→1 product design work
- Figma fluency

issueTemplates.title: Req: Account Executive
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Team:** Sales · **Level:** Mid · **Location:** Remote (US)

### Must-haves
- 3+ years closing SaaS deals $10k-$100k ACV

issueTemplates.title: Candidate: M. Chen — Account Executive
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
**Source:** Applied

**Stage notes:** Offer extended, awaiting response (deadline Friday).

views.name: Pipeline Board
views.description: Every candidate across every open req, grouped by stage.

views.name: Open Reqs
views.description: Requisitions only (filter to the Requisition issue type), for the hiring-plan review.

views.name: Candidates — Table
views.description: Full candidate list with source, stage, and req columns.
